'''shawushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecidosid|cecidosid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecidosid|cecidosid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shawushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæwishith|shæwishith]] || [[word:shæwishij|shæwishij]] || [[word:shæwishish|shæwishish]] || [[word:shæwishi|shæwishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shawuwushuth|shawuwushuth]] || [[word:shawuwushuj|shawuwushuj]] || [[word:shawuwushush|shawuwushush]] || [[word:shawuwushu|shawuwushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shawushuth|shawushuth]] || [[word:shawushuj|shawushuj]] || [[word:shawushush|shawushush]] || [[word:shawushu|shawushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shawufshuth|shawufshuth]] || [[word:shawufshuj|shawufshuj]] || [[word:shawufshush|shawufshush]] || [[word:shawufshuf|shawufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shawushuthu|shawushuthu]] || [[word:shawushuju|shawushuju]] || [[word:shawushushu|shawushushu]] || [[word:shawushuku|shawushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shawushuth|shawushuth]] || [[word:shawushuj|shawushuj]] || [[word:shawushush|shawushush]] || [[word:shawushu|shawushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shawushuthul|shawushuthul]] || [[word:shawushujul|shawushujul]] || [[word:shawushushul|shawushushul]] || [[word:shawushukul|shawushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shawushuthuthu|shawushuthuthu]] || [[word:shawushujuju|shawushujuju]] || [[word:shawushushushu|shawushushushu]] || [[word:shawushuku|shawushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shawushuthun|shawushuthun]] || [[word:shawushujun|shawushujun]] || [[word:shawushushun|shawushushun]] || [[word:shawushukun|shawushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shawushuthuoro|shawushuthuoro]] || [[word:shawushujuoro|shawushujuoro]] || [[word:shawushushuoro|shawushushuoro]] || [[word:shawushukuoro|shawushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
